linkedin_profile.headline: Director of Reservations at The Set Collection
linkedin_profile.about: I am someone who is passionate about Five Star Luxury Service not just within Room Reservations but across all departments. I believe in offering the highest level of service for the guest journey from the start of their booking process until departure, and increasing guest loyalty for future business. I have a proven track record of increasing sales conversion and closure on all enquiries whilst motivating and valuing my team. Since January 2019 I have successfully incorporated three separate Reservation Teams across The Set Hotels, that has seen the teams merge together, cross sell each property and introduced a 24 hours Reservation Department. This has ensured that we are available to our booking partners at any time of day, regardless of the time zone. This has been my proudest achievement in the last 12 months, along with a high staff retention rate and scoring highly in our colleague opinion survey of 2019.

experience.title: Director Of Digital, CRM Loyalty
experience.description: 1. Strategic Marketing: - Developing and executing innovative digital marketing strategies that elevate the brand's online presence and drive direct bookings. - Overseeing the creation of engaging content, social media campaigns and digital advertising to attract affluent travellers. - Analysing market trends and data to optimise marketing efforts and maximize ROI. 2. Customer Relationship Management (CRM): - Implemented a sophisticated CRM system to gather and analyse guest data, enabling personalised communication and targeted marketing. - Implementing and managing award-winning DISCOVERY loyalty programme. - Ensuring seamless integration of CRM tools across all touchpoints to maintain consistent and high-quality guest interactions. 3. Brand Loyalty and Guest Engagement: - Cultivating a deep understanding of guest preferences to tailor unique and culturally rich experiences that resonate with luxury travellers. - Developing exclusive offers and bespoke marketing campaigns that enhance guest loyalty and foster long-term relationships. - Coordinating with hotel managers and other departments to ensure a cohesive approach to guest satisfaction and retention. 4. Team Leadership and Collaboration: - Leading and mentoring a team of marketing and CRM professionals, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. - Collaborating with hotel GMs, sales teams, and external partners to align marketing initiatives with overall business objectives. - Monitor and report on performance metrics, providing insights and recommendations to senior management. 5. Innovation and Technology Integration: - Implementing cutting-edge tools and platforms to enhance the guest journey from initial engagement to post-stay follow-up. - Ensuring the seamless integration of all marketing efforts and systems with existing hotel operations.

experience.title: Senior Director Of Marketing
experience.description: As Senior Director of Marketing at The Set, I lead the strategic marketing direction for our curated collection of luxury hotels and residences, ensuring a strong, consistent brand presence across all touchpoints. My role encompasses brand development, digital strategy, content marketing to drive awareness, engagement and revenue. I oversee a central marketing team that supports both The Set and our owned hotels, acting as an in-house agency for creative design, digital marketing, and content strategy. Additionally, I collaborate closely with our hotels’ marketing teams, ensuring alignment while delivering tailored campaigns that enhance each property's unique positioning. Key responsibilities include: 1. Shaping and executing the global marketing strategy for The Set Collection 2. Strengthening brand identity and positioning across digital and offline channels 3. Leading content, social media, and digital performance strategies 4. Driving commercial success through innovative campaigns and partnerships 5. Supporting individual hotel marketing teams with strategic direction and execution 6. Managing relationships with agencies, media partners, and key stakeholders With a passion for luxury hospitality and brand storytelling, I’m dedicated to elevating The Set's presence in the global luxury travel landscape.

experience.title: Social Media And Community Executive
experience.description: I worked as a Social Media Executive at WeSwap, a unique peer-to-peer travel money platform, helping travellers everywhere get the fairest exchange rates. My role was to manage and maintain WeSwap's Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and LinkedIn accounts. My responsibilities included: - Developing and executing a social media strategy for each platform - Creating weekly reports to update the marketing team and business as a whole on engagement, following and social trends - Writing copy for all posts, ensuring they meet the brand tone of voice - Working closely with the design team to brief in and produce on-brand imagery to be used across all platforms - Develop and manage competitions, giveaways and campaigns to increase following and engagement - Run paid social campaigns for Facebook and Twitter - Managing public and private messages on all review platforms including Trustpilot, CompareHolidayMoney, Google Reviews and App Store reviews Achievements included: - Executing largest competition to date across WeSwap's social channels - Creating and implementing a process and training for customer support agents to reply to private messages on social platforms - Working with the CRM manager to create a social specific email as part of the customer journey - Producing videos as part of paid social campaigns - Forming relationships with a variety of small scale influencers to represent and advertise the brand

experience.title: Social Media Executive
experience.description: I worked as a Social Media Executive for a luxury travel tech scale-up that is in the process of building the world’s most rewarding travel & lifestyle platform. I managed social media accounts for clients in the UK, US and Canada, including the Montcalm and Park Grand Hotel chain. Responsibilities included: - Creating and implementing monthly social strategies for over eight accounts. - Ensuring all posts are scheduled and delivered on time to the correct platforms - Communicating social media trends and industry insights to clients - Managing and responding to public and private comments across all accounts - Providing monthly reports with updates on engagement, follower increase and global social trends
